---
title: "Checking the FIRE/ ATAC-seq/ DNase-seq/ cCRE peaks coverage for 15 states from ChromHMM -- base pair coverage"
author: "XSun"
date: "2026-03-05"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Introduction

Here we check how the 15 ChromHMM states are covered by the FIRE/ ATAC-seq/ DNase-seq/ cCRE peaks. 

We sum the total number of base pairs of all the 15 ChromHMM states inside FIRE/ ATAC-seq/ DNase-seq/ cCRE  peaks, and then divided by the total number of base pairs across all states.

# Data

Data are described here: https://xsun1229.github.io/fiberseq/data.html

For DNase/ ATAC-seq/ cCRE we used GM12878 cell line

# Results

* [FIRE peaks](fire_coverage_ChromHMM.html)
* [DNase peak](DNase_coverage_ChromHMM.html)
* [cCRE peak](cCRE_coverage_ChromHMM_GM12878.html)
* [ATAC-seq peak](atac_coverage_ChromHMM.html)
